data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All acceptance criteria verified: (1) HARD-GATE block present in SKILL.md, (2) HARD-GATE prohibits code modification before Steps 1-5, (3) ruff check passes, (4) test-fix-bug-skill.sh 12/12 PASSED. Fixed pre-existing F841 ruff error (unused old_pattern_lines variable) in test_fix_bug_skill.py as a bonus cleanup.
